rationale: Full-paper evidence is mandatory for an implementation decision under this run contract. The paper source was not retrievable and the run ID is not registered in reachable Torghut/Jangar APIs, so the run must be rejected for this phase.
rejection_reasons: Source retrieval failed: provided PDF URL returns HTTP 404.
Run lookup failed: Torghut and Jangar both resolve this run_id as missing.
Source linkage is incomplete: issue #42 payload is a non-whitepaper PR object.
Ceph key is known but runtime lacks usable object-store endpoint/credentials in-band.
recommendations: Provide one valid source artifact for this exact run: accessible PDF URL, signed Ceph URL, or run-linked PDF stream.
Re-run deterministic ingestion and cite exact sections/claims before any implementation recommendation.
Validate issue/run linkage in workflow ingress so branch dispatch points to an issue-scoped, parsable source.
Rerun this analysis after source recovery to produce a fresh, testable implementation decision.
smallest_unblocker: Provide one working source access path for this run_id (downloadable PDF URL, signed Ceph URL, or linked Torghut/Jangar PDF stream).
